lastStrategyDecision.reason: Evidence remains low-conviction for automated intraday execution: marketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume ~1.0 provides no participation edge, averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.19%) reducing clean momentum continuation odds, averageLiquidityScore ~52 is only moderate (slippage/stop uncertainty), and averageCatalystScore ~22 is weak (lower follow-through). Although uptrendShare is decent (0.6) and data freshness is excellent (20/20), the overall tape quality does not justify new entries. Maintain a conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP plan with bracket exits for clear, auditable stops/targets, but observe/scan only until RVOL, liquidity, and catalyst strength improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
